description: Building and maintaining C#/.NET APIs serving millions of daily client requests, with full ownership across design, deployment, and production reliability. Led the end-to-end delivery of a greenfield API service on Pivotal Cloud Foundry backed by Aerospike, and modernized the team's BDD testing infrastructure with Reqnroll and Docker. Also builds internal developer tooling in .NET Core and React TypeScript for application health monitoring and team productivity.
bullets: Designed, developed, and maintained C#/.NET APIs serving millions of client requests daily, ensuring high reliability and performance
Led end-to-end architecture and deployment of a greenfield API service on Pivotal Cloud Foundry, backed by an Aerospike NoSQL data store
Modernized BDD testing infrastructure using Reqnroll and Docker, improving automation speed, reliability, and CI/CD integration
Built internal developer tooling in .NET Core and React TypeScript for application health monitoring and team productivity

position: Foundations of Software Engineering Teaching Assistant
description: Led weekly lab sessions for a class of 20 students in Foundations of Software Engineering, covering full-stack development fundamentals, software design principles, and engineering best practices. Graded assignments with constructive feedback and held office hours for individualized guidance.
bullets: Led weekly lab sessions for a class of 20 students covering full-stack development fundamentals, software design principles, and engineering best practices

description: Built a full-stack internal tool in .NET Core and React TypeScript to monitor live API health, detect service changes, and proactively alert teams to failures and outages via email notifications. Deployed via IIS on a Windows server with a persistent background service handling continuous real-time polling.
bullets: Built a .NET Core and React TypeScript dashboard to monitor live API health, detect service changes, and proactively alert teams to failures and outages via email notifications
Deployed via IIS on a Windows server with a persistent background service continuously polling for real-time status updates

description: Designed and developed a Unity game in C# for a research study on game-based handwriting skill improvement. Integrated Google Cloud Vision OCR to validate written input and built a custom handwriting analysis system evaluating stroke smoothness, writing speed, cursive level, and consistency. Conducted a study with 15+ participants as part of an undergraduate research thesis.
bullets: Designed and developed a Unity (C#) video game for handwriting-skill enhancement research, integrating real-time data capture and analysis
Conducted a study with 15+ participants as part of an undergraduate thesis on game-based learning

description: Modernized a legacy COBOL ERP system used by manufacturing companies for supply management, rebuilding multiple screens in .NET WinForms and Visual Basic. Redesigned the team's COBOL-to-VB auto-conversion framework to support multi-item form generation, extending it beyond its original single-item constraint.
bullets: Rebuilt multiple screens of a legacy COBOL ERP system in .NET WinForms and Visual Basic for manufacturing supply management
Redesigned the team's COBOL-to-VB auto-conversion framework to support multi-item form generation, extending it beyond its original single-item limitation
